title: CodeChickenCore Unofficial 1.7.10
description: Contains common code for all Chicken-Bones (Unofficial).
body:
Contains common code for all Chicken-Bones (Unofficial).  

 

Features Include:
* Being able to run NotEnoughItems

* ASM hooks for drag and drop

* runtime deobfuscation utilities

Forked and maintained by the Gregtech New Horizons Modpack, for use on 1.7.10.  Required for usage of NotEnoughItems Unofficial.
